title: Greenpill 2024: A Year in Review
dek: The public Greenpill Year in Review gives the site a broad source for 2024 chapter, guild, governance, and education activity.
excerpt: A network-level recap of 2024 across chapters, grant rounds, Greenpill Nigeria, Brasil, Uncommons, Gardens experiments, and Dev Guild work.
body:
The 2024 Year in Review is a network-level source, not a shortcut for turning every mentioned activity into operational content.

The article documents a year where Greenpill chapters, guilds, and allied communities moved from broad movement energy into more specific local and builder work. It names grant rounds in Nigeria and Brazil, Squad Staking with New York City, Ottawa, and the Dev Guild, Brazil's IPFS and ReFi event work, Gardens governance experiments, Nigeria's sanitation and Impact Miner activity, Brasil's agroforestry and living-center work, and Uncommons education and publication activity.

For the website, the story should give readers a sourced overview while keeping operational records focused. Brasil's agroforestry and living-center work is strong enough to seed a chapter initiative; other single-line examples should stay narrative until stronger chapter-owned sources exist.

## Sources

- S069: https://paragraph.com/@greenpill/2024-a-year-in-review
author: Greenpill Network research
